narrative:
32Thorns (precinct in Perry County) has 447 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points.
